headline: America’s Debt Just Shattered a WWII Record. Elon Musk Says Only One Thing Can Save Us.
summary: Federal debt just crossed a threshold not seen since soldiers were coming home from World War II, and the math shows spending cuts cannot close the gap. Elon Musk says only one force in the world is large enough to prevent national bankruptcy.

headline: Elon Musk's Tesla Releases Wall Street Estimates Ahead of Q2 Earnings: Here's What Analysts Expect
summary: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) released its company-compiled data of sell-side analysts’ forecasts for the automaker’s second-quarter 2026 earnings estimates ahead of this week’s earnings call. Analysts Predict $27 Billion in Revenue On Saturday, the Elon Musk-led automaker announced earnings forecasts from analysts at JP Morgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM), Goldman Sachs Group Inc. (NYSE:GS) and several others. Read Also: This Week in Tesla: Elon Musk Faces Pay Package Questions, US EV Prices Fall and More
